name: qase-python-commons

metadata.name: qase-python-commons
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License
metadata.summary: A library for Qase TestOps and Qase Report

documentation:
# Qase Python Commons

## Description

This package contains reporters for Qase TestOps and Qase Report that are used in [qase-pytest](https://github.com/qase-tms/qase-python/tree/master/qase-pytest) and [qase-robotframework](https://github.com/qase-tms/qase-python/tree/master/qase-robotframework).

## How to install

`pip install qase-python-commons`

classes.name: qase.commons.utils.StringFormatter
documentation:
is designed to enhance string formatting by allowing it to gracefully handle and skip any keys in the format string 
that are not provided in the arguments, rather than raising exceptions for missing keys or indexes. 
This makes it particularly useful for formatting strings in contexts where not all variables may be known 
or provided ahead of time, enhancing robustness and reducing the need for extensive error handling in code 
that generates dynamic text output.

methods.name: qase.commons.client.base_api_client.BaseApiClient.get_project
documentation:
Load a project from Qase TestOps by code and return project data

```
param project_code

project code

return

project data or None if project not found
```

methods.name: qase.commons.client.base_api_client.BaseApiClient.get_environment
documentation:
Load an environment from Qase TestOps by name and returns environment id

```
param environment

environment name

param project_code

project code

return

environment id or None if environment not found
```

methods.name: qase.commons.client.base_api_client.BaseApiClient.complete_run
documentation:
Complete a test run in Qase TestOps

```

project code

param run_id

test run id

return

None
```

methods.name: qase.commons.client.base_api_client.BaseApiClient._upload_attachment
documentation:
Upload an attachment to Qase TestOps

```
param project_code

project code

param attachment

attachment model

return

attachment data or None if attachment not uploaded
```

methods.name: qase.commons.client.base_api_client.BaseApiClient.create_test_run
documentation:
Create a test run in Qase TestOps

```
param project_code

project code

param title

test run title

param description

test run description

param plan_id

plan id

param environment_id

environment id

return

test run id
```

methods.name: qase.commons.client.base_api_client.BaseApiClient.check_test_run
documentation:
Check if test run exists in Qase TestOps
\:param project_code: project code
\:param run_id: test run id
\:return: True if test run exists, False otherwise

methods.name: qase.commons.client.base_api_client.BaseApiClient.send_results
documentation:
Send test results to Qase TestOps
\:param project_code: project code
\:param run_id: test run id
\:param results: results data
\:return: None

def _selective_execution_setup(self) -> list:
# Load execution plan from file
path = self.config.execution_plan.path
if not self.config.execution_plan.path and path and os.path.isfile(self.config.execution_plan.path):
with open(self.config.execution_plan.path) as f:
return json.load(f)
# Load execution plan from command line or env variable
if self.config.self.config.execution_plan.path:
